summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Explorer redesign on Structure tab. All major features working correctly with user-friendly interface.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Request failed with status code 404 shown in UI
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - does not affect TA Explorer functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Occasional DOM detachment error when switching tabs quickly

passed_tests: Structure tab shows updated TA Explorer with full-width layout
Pattern Lifecycle displays all 4 stages: Forming, Developing, Confirmed, Invalidated
Patterns tab shows exactly 3 expected patterns: Double Bottom (78%), Loose Wedge (46%), Loose Range (30%)
Analysis tab displays 10 layers in user-friendly format (no JSON)
No Trade tab shows clear status with reason: 'Signal is WEAK — insufficient confidence'
No duplicate pattern cards found under chart (duplication successfully removed)
Pattern Lifecycle integration at top of TA Explorer working correctly
All TA Explorer tabs (Patterns, Analysis, No Trade) functional and accessible
